mapper.select: select u.id, u.user_code as userCode, u.username, u.real_name as realName, u.password, u.status, r.id as roleId, r.role_code as roleCode, r.role_name as roleName from sys_user u left join sys_role r on r.id = u.role_id where u.username = #{username}

select u.id, u.user_code as userCode, u.username, u.real_name as realName, u.password, u.status, r.id as roleId, r.role_code as roleCode, r.role_name as roleName from sys_user u left join sys_role r on r.id = u.role_id where u.id = #{userId}

select m.id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.menu_path, m.permission_code, m.sort_no from sys_menu m join sys_role_menu rm on rm.menu_id = m.id where rm.role_id = #{roleId} and m.status = 1 order by m.sort_no, m.id
